name: Large Wood Milk Crate Toy Kids' Storage Bin - Pillowfort™
description: Make a practical addition to any kids' space with this Large Wood Milk Crate Toy Storage Bin from Pillowfort™. Made with wood in a natural grain finish, this large storage bin complements their room decor well, and offers ample space for their toys, pillows and other items to help keep their room clutter-free. It comes in a stackable design that makes it perfect to display on its own or stack on top of another one to save on space. And with the cutout double handles, this square storage crate offers convenient carrying for moving from room to room. Thickness of the wood in the sides is 10mm and bottom is 8mm.
